transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hello, this is Alex calling on behalf of DemoLender. Am I speaking with Asha Menon?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You currently have fifty thousand rupees outstanding, and we can close the loan at thirty five thousand rupees. Is this a good time to talk?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I am at work right now.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Understood. Before I let you go, is there a better time for a quick callback?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you. I have scheduled a callback for tomorrow evening.
